data.name: Liese in the City of Trials
data.detailed_description:
When the Demon Lord plunged the world into fear, it was the hero Liese who rose up to restore peace. Years after the Demon Lord's defeat, Liese hears rumors of a fortress appearing near the city of Wes in the Demon Lord's old territory. Liese arrives to find the city under constant threat from monsters, and it's up to her to save Wes before it falls to the demons.

Fend off monsters with a stress-free action RPG system that doesn't require any grinding to advance. Use items and Liese's finishing move to defeat powerful enemies and bosses.

Action RPG Gameplay

Run around and swing your sword as you cut down enemies in this action-based RPG. There's no need to wait for turn-based battles when you can hack and slash through enemies at your own pace!
data.about_the_game:
When the Demon Lord plunged the world into fear, it was the hero Liese who rose up to restore peace. Years after the Demon Lord's defeat, Liese hears rumors of a fortress appearing near the city of Wes in the Demon Lord's old territory. Liese arrives to find the city under constant threat from monsters, and it's up to her to save Wes before it falls to the demons.

Fend off monsters with a stress-free action RPG system that doesn't require any grinding to advance. Use items and Liese's finishing move to defeat powerful enemies and bosses.

Action RPG Gameplay

Run around and swing your sword as you cut down enemies in this action-based RPG. There's no need to wait for turn-based battles when you can hack and slash through enemies at your own pace!
data.short_description: Years after the hero Liese restored peace to the world, a new, fearsome fortress has suddenly risen. Monsters plague the world once more, and now it's up to Liese to save the day!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Mofuya, All Rights Reserved.
